name: pi-zerg-swarm
description: Bootstrap scaffold for a Pi coding-agent extension that will coordinate high-capacity agentic teams.

scripts.check:package: node -e "const fs = require('node:fs'); const pkg = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json', 'utf8')); const lock = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package-lock.json', 'utf8')); const ts = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('tsconfig.json', 'utf8')); const privatePaths = ['prompts','planning','.pi','.claude','.codex','.agents']; const errors = []; const root = (lock.packages && lock.packages['']) || {}; if (pkg.version !== lock.version) { errors.push('package-lock top-level version does not match package.json'); } if (root.version !== pkg.version) { errors.push('package-lock root package version does not match package.json'); } if (pkg.license !== 'MIT') { errors.push('package.json license must be MIT'); } if (root.license !== 'MIT' && lock.license !== 'MIT') { errors.push('package-lock license metadata must be MIT'); } if (!Array.isArray(pkg.files) || privatePaths.some((privatePath) => pkg.files.some((entry) => entry === privatePath || entry.startsWith(privatePath + '/')))) { errors.push('package.json files must exclude private paths'); } if (!Array.isArray(ts.exclude) || !privatePaths.every((privatePath) => ts.exclude.includes(privatePath))) { errors.push('tsconfig.exclude must include prompts, planning, .pi, .claude, .codex, and .agents'); } if (!Array.isArray(ts.exclude) || !ts.exclude.includes('node_modules')) { errors.push('tsconfig.exclude must include node_modules'); } if (!pkg.repository) { console.warn('check:package warning: package.json repository metadata is missing; canonical repository URL is not configured'); } if (errors.length) { console.error('check:package failed'); for (const error of errors) { console.error('- ' + error); } process.exit(1); } console.log('check:package passed for ' + pkg.name + ' v' + pkg.version);"
scripts.check:version: node -e "const fs = require('node:fs'); const { execSync } = require('node:child_process'); const pkg = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json', 'utf8')); const targetTag = 'v' + pkg.version; const tags = execSync('git tag --points-at HEAD').toString().trim().split(String.fromCharCode(10)).filter(Boolean); if (!tags.includes(targetTag)) { console.error('check:version failed: expected tag ' + targetTag + ' at HEAD, found: ' + (tags.length ? tags.join(', ') : '(none)')); process.exit(1); } console.log('check:version passed for ' + targetTag + ' at HEAD');"
